chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4461 of 2020. ------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Priority. 1. For Hearing of CMA No.18797/2020. 2. For Hearing of Main Case. 11th October, 2021. S. Ghulam Hussain advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ch. Muhammad Ashraf Khan advocate for respondent No.2to4. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, DAG. ************ Present petition is disposed of in terms of order dated 08.09.2021 passed in CP No.D-5028/2021 whereby respondents were directed to decide the representation filed by the petitioner. In present case representation is already pending with respondents. Needless to mention that judgment passed in Civil Appeal No.3435/2018 as envisaged by the counsel for the petitioners may be examined, if the same is applicable as well as opportunity of personal hearing shall be provided representation of the petitioners will be decided within two months. JUDGE JUDGE M.Zeeshan
